title: Wapol’s Name Alarms Dalton
description: On pages 1–4, wapol’s name alarms dalton as wapol comes back to reclaim his kingdom as Luffy, Sanji, and Nami prepare for the dangerous climb toward Dr. Kureha.
scene: Wapol’s Name Alarms Dalton. Wapol comes back to reclaim his kingdom as Luffy, Sanji, and Nami prepare for the dangerous climb toward Dr. Kureha. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: What...!?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Do you people know about Wapol!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: know him? We don't know Jack other than him being the pirate who attacked our ship...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 'course, I was the one who chased him away.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: But now that I think about it, he did say something about Drum kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Yes, I remember clearly now...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: He's the same man I met,

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Back when I was a little girl and father took me to the council of kings.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Council of Kings...!? Who are you exactly...?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Ah- Umm...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: I-IN ANY CASE! We did meet Wapol!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: We came across him only yesterday while on our way here.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Are you telling the truth...!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: What does this all mean?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You said that the country was destroyed but then why is the king alive and well being a pirate out of all things!?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: him being a pirate is just a disguise.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's most likely been loitering around the oceans here waiting for the right time to come back.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: So then... Wapol and his men were driven out of this island and forced to be pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After being unable to fight off the Blackbeard Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: unable to fight off...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WRONG!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Back when the pirates attacked this country,

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: The king and his soldiers didn't even TRY to mount a resistance!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Once Wapol realized just how strong the pirates were,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He simply abandoned his own country,

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: By immediately taking off to the seas faster than anyone else!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: All the citizens were dismayed by such an act of cowardice committed by their own king...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: And he calls himself a king!?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Vivl...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: It's beyond cruel... How could the King just abandon his people...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Exactly...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: But thanks to that, Wapol's reign of tyranny finally came to an end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This island now belongs to those of us who remained behind...! The towns are slowly beginning to recover,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and we're now in the midst of forging a new country.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: That is why the thing we dread the most is Wapol'S return.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: At this time of great unrest and uneasiness,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We must prevent that at all costs!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: For the purpose of creating a better country for a better tomorrow,

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: We must...!

summary: This part centers on wapol’s name alarms dalton, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
